subcodes.first_line: The resplendent Light, gleaming, manifest and radiant, shining forth from the horizon of God's Revelation, the Lord of all mankind, and the divine fragrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: النور الساطع اللائح الظاهر المشرق من افق ظهور الله مولی الوری و النفحات
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for forgiveness, @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment
